LanguageData.SAB_Configure_Desc: Open the configuration panel to set wealth suppression per category (items: {0}, buildings: {1}, pawns: {2} silver).
LanguageData.SAB_DialogTitle: Subspace Asset Blackhole — Wealth Suppression Settings
LanguageData.SAB_Inspect_Active: Subspace field active: items -{0}, buildings -{1}, pawns -{2} silver
LanguageData.SAB_Inspect_Unpowered: Subspace field offline (items {0}, buildings {1}, pawns {2} silver — currently inactive)
